perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} The sky's been strange {time_ref}. {local_complaint} Folk keep glancing upward like the weather owes them an explanation. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: Strange how?
Is it causing real problems?
Does the weather shift often around here?
So people are used to it, then?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} {time_ref}, the wind changed {direction} and hasn't let up since. {traveler_news} {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What does the wind have to do with anything?
And people pay attention to that sort of thing?
Has this affected daily life much?
How do you manage when it gets bad?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} Fine day today, but {time_ref} it was miserable. {local_complaint} The sort of weather that keeps everyone indoors grumbling. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: I can imagine. What were people grumbling about?
Any silver lining?
Does bad weather hit this area hard?
What's the worst you've seen?

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} The weather around {subject_focus} isn't natural: something {direction} is causing it. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: What makes you say it isn't natural?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} The market's been busier than usual {time_ref}. {trade_gossip} Always good to see coin changing hands. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What's driving the business?
Who benefits most from that?
Any trouble with supply lately?
That must be frustrating for the merchants.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} {time_ref}, a trader from {direction} came through with all sorts of goods. {trade_gossip} {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: Anything unusual in their stock?
Is there much demand for that kind of thing here?
Do traders come through often?
Must be nice to see new faces.

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} The trouble with {subject_focus} has started choking the supply lines {direction}. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: How bad is it for business?

decisive.prompt: I'll see what I can do about the route.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} I've been busy at the workbench {time_ref}. {trade_gossip} A craftsman's hands are never idle for long. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What are you working on?
Sounds like skilled work. Where did you learn?
Are the other crafters keeping busy too?
Is there much competition between you?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} Good materials have been harder to come by {time_ref}. {local_complaint} You can't make quality work from scraps. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What materials are you short on?
Can you source them from somewhere else?
Is this affecting the whole settlement?
How are you getting by in the meantime?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} Someone brought in a piece {time_ref} that had the whole workshop talking. {trade_gossip} Craftsmanship like you rarely see anymore. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What was so special about it?
Could you make something like that?
Where did it come from?
Do people around here value that kind of work?

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} My craft depends on materials that {subject_focus} has put in jeopardy {direction}. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: What do you need to keep working?

decisive.prompt: I'll sort out the supply for you.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} The settlement's been lively {time_ref}. {local_complaint} Opinions are like weeds: pull one up and three more sprout. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What's everyone so worked up about?
Where do you stand on it?
Is that kind of squabbling common here?
How does it usually get resolved?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} Good to see a new face around here. {time_ref}, {traveler_news} It's been all anyone talks about. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What's the general feeling about it?
And the more level-headed folk?
Do newcomers usually get this kind of welcome?
I'll try not to cause a stir, then.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} {time_ref}, the elders held a meeting about {subject_focus}. {local_complaint} Everyone's got an opinion, but nobody's got a plan. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What came of the meeting?
That doesn't sound very productive.
Do the elders usually agree on things?
Sounds like there's a story behind that.

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} The community's concern about {subject_focus} has gone beyond words. Someone needs to act. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: What needs doing?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} The woods {direction} have been lovely {time_ref}. {traveler_news} Nature has its own way of keeping things interesting. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What did you see out there?
Does anyone else appreciate it like you do?
Do you spend much time in the wilds?
What keeps drawing you back?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} {time_ref}, the birds went quiet in the forest {direction}. {local_complaint} Probably nothing, but the silence was eerie. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: Has that happened before?
What do the old-timers make of it?
Do animals often behave oddly here?
You seem to notice these things more than most.

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} The changes in the wilds near {subject_focus} {direction} aren't slowing down. Someone needs to find the cause. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: Should I be concerned?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} Things were different before, you know. {time_ref}, {traveler_news} It got me thinking about how much has changed. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: Changed for the better?
You sound like you miss the old days.
What was it like before?
Do others around here feel the same way?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} I remember when {subject_focus} wasn't worth a second thought. {time_ref}, {local_complaint} Times move on, I suppose. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What changed?
Do you think things could go back to the way they were?
Is the younger generation aware of how things used to be?
That must be hard to watch.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} An old song came to mind {time_ref}. {trade_gossip} Funny how a melody can bring back a whole lifetime of memories. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What kind of song?
Does anyone still sing it?
What did it remind you of?
Those sound like good memories.

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} The way things are going with {subject_focus}, the old days won't come back on their own. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: What would it take to set things right?

decisive.prompt: I'll see what can be done.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} I've been puzzling over something {time_ref}. {traveler_news} Can't seem to make sense of it. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What's got you thinking?
That is odd. Have you asked around?
Maybe I can help figure it out.
Interesting. What's your best guess?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} {time_ref}, I noticed something peculiar {direction}. {trade_gossip} Probably nothing, but my curiosity won't let it rest. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: Peculiar in what way?
Has anyone else noticed?
Are you the type to investigate?
I admire the curiosity, at least.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} Tell me, do you ever wonder about {subject_focus}? {time_ref}, {strange_event} It's been nagging at me since. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: I hadn't thought about it, honestly.
Now you've got me curious too.
What do other folk make of it?
Nobody seems to have the full picture, then.

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} My poking around about {subject_focus} turned up something {direction} that can't be ignored. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: What did you find?

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} There's a gathering coming up, and the whole settlement's buzzing. {time_ref}, {trade_gossip} Any excuse for folk to come together. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What kind of gathering?
Sounds like the settlement could use the cheer.
Are you looking forward to it?
You seem to enjoy these things.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} {time_ref}, word spread about a celebration {direction}. {traveler_news} The mood's already lighter just from the talk of it. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What's the occasion?
Does the settlement have these often?
Will there be anything special this time?
I might have to stick around for that.

perspectives.intro: {tone_opener} The children are already running around talking about the festival. {time_ref}, {local_complaint} But everyone agrees the celebration should still go ahead. {tone_closer}

exploratories.prompt: What sort of festival is it?
That sounds like quite the tradition.
What were the complaints about?
Will they sort it out in time?

questHookPerspectives.intro: {quest_exposition} The festivities are threatened by the situation with {subject_focus} {direction}. {quest_detail}

exploratories.prompt: What's threatening the celebration?

decisive.prompt: I'll make sure it goes ahead.
